findings.description: Knowledge file adds '> **注意**:' callout framing to the sentence about internal auto-review being excluded from the screen transition diagram. The source presents this as a plain informational sentence with no warning/note marker.
findings.source_evidence: Source: 'また、ローン申請承認機能のうち内部自動審査はバッチ処理で実現しているため、本遷移には含まれていない。' — no warning label in source.
